source_note: Interior Alaska Transportation Plan notes the Edgerton Highway was named for U.S. Army Major Glenn Edgerton.
Interior Alaska Transportation Plan says the highway was named after Malcolm Elliott
Interior Alaska Transportation Plan says the Anchorage-Fairbanks Highway was renamed the George Parks Highway in commemoration of Territorial Governor George Parks.
Interior Alaska Transportation Plan says the highway was eventually named for Major Richardson.
Interior Alaska Transportation Plan says the Steese Highway was named after Gen. James G. Steese
column7: former president of the Alaska Road Commission.

source_note: Historic Roads of Alaska (2017) notes the road was newly named the James W. Dalton Highway.
